name: Roasted Garlic Dip
recipeIngredient: 8 oz cream cheese, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C).
2. Toast almonds for 10 minutes in the preheated oven.
3. Lower heat to 275°F (135°C) and place oil in an ovenproof dish with a cover.
4. Add garlic cloves to the dish, covering it again.
5. Bake at 275°F (135°C) for 40 minutes or until tender but not browned.
6. Allow garlic to cool completely.
7. Transfer garlic and oil to a blender or food processor.
8. Blend briefly.
9. Add cream cheese, Worcestershire sauce, mustard, and sour cream; blend well.
10. Incorporate parsley, almonds, rosemary, shallots, salt, and pepper.
11. Blend again.
12. Check consistency; if thick, add milk to reach desired texture.
13. Scoop into a serving bowl and chill for at least 2 hours before serving. Makes about 1 1/2 cups.
